name: data-analysis
tagline: ClawHub (125★): Data analysis and visualization. Query databases, generate reports, automate spreadsheets, and turn raw data into clear, ac
verdict: Nearly clean — strong security and quality throughout. The one real defect is cosmetic but real: the name field is 'Data Analysis' with a space and capitals, failing to match its own directory, which can break exact-name lookups even though a separate slug field is correct.

highlights.summary: name is 'Data Analysis' (space, capital letters), failing the kebab-case regex and not matching the data-analysis directory/slug; the separate `slug: data-analysis` field is kebab-
